name: M-201
events: 19 Jan 1944 M-201 fires two torpedoes against the German merchant Dessau (5933 GRT, built 1923) 2 nautical miles east of Berlev?g, Norway in position 70°87'N, 29°17'E. The torpedoes missed their target.

26 May 1944 M-201 fires four torpedoes against 'what are identified as ' a auxiliary patrol vessel and a merchant in a German convoy north of the Syltefjord in position 70°70'N, 30°40'E. All four torpedoes missed their targets.
16 Jun 1944 M-201 fires two torpedoes against the wreck of the German merchant Natal (3172 GRT, built 1922) off Makkaur.

19 Aug 1944 M-201 torpedoed and sank the German auxiliary patrol vessel V 6112 / Friesse (452 GRT, built 1937, former British Bradman) off the Persfjord 7 nautical miles north-west of Vard?, Norway in position 70°47'N, 30°95'E.
